top_signals.title: Mitchell: Hormuz Toll Needs Clarity in US-Iran talks
top_signals.summary: Iran's deputy foreign minister says they remain firm on maintaining control over maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, ahead of fresh negotiations with the US on ending the war. Victoria Mitchell, Senior Analyst at Control Risks spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa about the tolling of the waterway. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Prices Rise After US, Iran Attacks and Amidst Hopes of Hormuz Shipping Recovery
top_signals.summary: Oil prices gained more than 1% on Monday after attacks by the U.S. and Iran underscored the fragility of their interim peace deal, while cautious hopes of a continued recovery in energy shipping through the Strait of Hormuz limited gains.Iranian and U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: New Russian‑Flagged LNG Tanker Begins Operations For US Project
top_signals.summary: A newly Russian-flagged LNG tanker - Arctic Express - has picked up a cargo of liquefied natural gas from a floating storage facility used to trans-ship gas from the Arctic LNG 2 project, which is under U.S. sanctions, LSEG data showed.Arctic LNG 2…

top_signals.title: 101st soldiers use drones to drop grappling hooks, breach razor wire
top_signals.summary: The Army should treat drones like ammo, one officer said, estimating a brigade needs between 1,000 to 1,500 drones per week in sustained combat operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Natural Gas Prices Fall With Ample Supply Maintaining Pressure on Market
top_signals.summary: U.S. natural gas futures fell for a second straight session on Monday, as ample supplies kept pressure on the market despite forecasts for hotter weather in the coming weeks. On its first day as the front-month, gas futures for August delivery on the New York Mercantile Exchange fell 8.2 cents…

top_signals.title: Duke Energy to Terminate NC Offshore Wind Lease
top_signals.summary: Duke Energy will terminate its offshore wind lease in the Carolina Long Bay area under a settlement agreement with the U.S. Interior Department and reinvest nearly $129 million in additional power generation capacity in the Carolinas, the department said on Monday.(Reuters)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US racks up about 400 wins over illegal World Cup streaming sites
top_signals.summary: The World Cup’s organizing body, FIFA, helped identify hundreds of  domains taken down in an action organized by the U.S., along with the help of U.S. broadcaster NBC Universal and other entities.
